issue_title: Feature Request: Support text-to-speech (--tts) playback for model responses
issue_body:
### Description
I would love to have a text-to-speech (TTS) playback option built into the CLI for hands-free workflow sessions.

### Proposed Solution
Add a `--tts` or `--audio-output` flag when launching `gemini`. When enabled, the CLI would stream audio playback of the model's generated text response using native system audio APIs.

### Use Case
Useful when listening to long code reviews or architectural summaries while multi-tasking.

golden_spec_rationale: Feature request issue; quality is FEATURE.
